mapper.sql: id, invoiceId, invoiceNo, poNo, lineItem, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, modelNo, quantity, barCode, caseNo, supplierId, greenCode, receiveWarehouseId, receiveDate, impTime, stateCode, insertTime, updateTime, supplierExpDate, operate, weight
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_impdata
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_impdata (id, invoiceId, invoiceNo, poNo, lineItem, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, modelNo, quantity, barCode, caseNo, supplierId, greenCode, receiveWarehouseId, receiveDate, impTime, stateCode, insertTime, updateTime, supplierExpDate, operate, weight) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{greencode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{receivewarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receivedate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{imptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{statecode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{supplierexpdate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{operate,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL})

update dbo.ops_impdata
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoiceId = #{record.invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

operate = #{record.operate,jdbcType=CHAR},
weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

update dbo.ops_impdata
invoiceId = #{invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poNo = #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lineItem = #{lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
orderNo = #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemNo = #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},

modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
barCode = #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

supplierId = #{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
greenCode = #{greencode,jdbcType=CHAR},
receiveWarehouseId = #{receivewarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
receiveDate = #{receivedate,jdbcType=DATE},
impTime = #{imptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
stateCode = #{statecode,jdbcType=CHAR},
insertTime = #{inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
supplierExpDate = #{supplierexpdate,jdbcType=DATE},
operate = #{operate,jdbcType=CHAR},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
